instruction: Write a follow-up email to a diamond buyer who hasn't responded in 2 weeks. Deal: 5ct Round Brilliant lot. Company: KDL.
response:
Dear [Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to follow up on our recent discussion regarding the 5ct Round Brilliant lot we presented.

Given current market conditions, this parcel represents excellent value and we have strong interest from other buyers. I'd appreciate the opportunity to finalize terms before the end of this week.

Please let me know a convenient time to connect.

Warm regards,
Krisha Diam Limited

instruction: Write a cold outreach email to a jewelry manufacturer in Hong Kong about our GIA-certified diamond inventory.
response:
Dear [Name],

I am writing from Krisha Diam Limited, a B2B diamond wholesaler with operations across 28+ countries.

We maintain a curated inventory of GIA-certified diamonds across all shapes and sizes, with competitive pricing and flexible payment terms suited to manufacturers.

I would be pleased to share our current stocklist and discuss how we might support your production requirements.

Kind regards,
Krisha Diam Limited

instruction: Write a proposal acceptance confirmation email for a 10ct fancy yellow diamond deal.
response:
Dear [Name],

Thank you for your confirmation — we are pleased to proceed with the 10ct Fancy Yellow Diamond as discussed.

We will prepare the necessary documentation and arrange shipment per the agreed terms. Please expect our invoice within 24 hours.

We appreciate your continued partnership and look forward to completing this transaction smoothly.

Best regards,
Krisha Diam Limited

instruction: Write an email introducing our GLISS-3000++ diamond detection machine to a gemological lab.
response:
Dear [Name],

I hope you are doing well. I am reaching out to introduce the GLISS-3000++, our advanced diamond detection instrument now available for gemological laboratories.

The device accurately identifies natural, synthetic, and treated diamonds with industry-leading precision, making it an invaluable tool for any certification lab.

I would welcome the opportunity to arrange a demonstration at your facility.

Warm regards,
KDL IMPEX
